meta.summary: GTDB-Tk 2.7.2 runtime for assigning bacterial and archaeal genomes to the Genome Taxonomy Database. The large GTDB-Tk R232 reference package is external and user-provided through GTDBTK_DATA_PATH.
meta.description: GTDB-Tk 2.7.2 runtime for assigning bacterial and archaeal genomes to the Genome Taxonomy Database. The large GTDB-Tk R232 reference package is external and user-provided through GTDBTK_DATA_PATH.

test: gtdbtk --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'gtdbtk: version 2.7.2 Copyright 2017 Pierre-Alain Chaumeil, Aaron Mussig and Donovan Parks' >/dev/null && gtdbtk --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'GTDB-Tk v2.7.2' >/dev/null && python3 -c 'import gtdbtk, dendropy, numpy, tqdm, pydantic; print(gtdbtk.__version__)' | grep -Fx '2.7.2' >/dev/null

gtdbtk classify_wf --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage: gtdbtk classify_wf' >/dev/null && gtdbtk de_novo_wf --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage: gtdbtk de_novo_wf' >/dev/null && gtdbtk identify --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage: gtdbtk identify' >/dev/null && gtdbtk align --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage: gtdbtk align' >/dev/null && gtdbtk check_install --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'GTDB-Tk version package to test for compatibility' >/dev/null && gtdbtk test --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage: gtdbtk test' >/dev/null

prodigal -v 2>&1 | grep -F 'Prodigal V2.6.3' >/dev/null && hmmsearch -h 2>&1 | grep -F '# HMMER 3.3.2' >/dev/null && hmmalign -h 2>&1 | grep -F '# HMMER 3.3.2' >/dev/null && pplacer --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'v1.1.alpha19-0-g807f6f3' >/dev/null && guppy --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'v1.1.alpha19-0-g807f6f3' >/dev/null && FastTree 2>&1 | grep -F 'FastTree Version 2.1.11' >/dev/null && FastTreeMP 2>&1 | grep -F 'FastTree Version 2.1.11' >/dev/null && skani -V 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'skani 0.3.1' >/dev/null

gtdb_to_ncbi_majority_vote --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'GTDB to NCBI Majority Vote v0.2.1' >/dev/null && gtdb_to_ncbi_majority_vote.py --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Translate GTDB to NCBI classification via majority vote' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-gtdbtk-helper-$$; rm -rf "$tmp" && mkdir -p "$tmp" && gtdbtk-download-r232-db --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Download and install the GTDB-Tk R232 reference package' >/dev/null && (cd "$tmp" && gtdbtk-download-r232-db --dry-run 2>&1 | grep -F 'Download directory:' | grep -F "$tmp/downloads" >/dev/null) && mkdir -p "$tmp/existing/r232" && gtdbtk-download-r232-db --db-root "$tmp/existing" 2>&1 | grep -F "Existing DBROOT/r232 directory found: $tmp/existing/r232" >/dev/null && gtdbtk-download-r232-db --dry-run --db-root /tmp/taf-gtdbtk-r232-db-explicit 2>&1 | grep -F 'Expected MD5: 25a59e0352b1fd150c589f56559767d4' >/dev/null; status=$?; rm -rf "$tmp"; exit "$status"

tmp=/tmp/taf-gtdbtk-no-db-$$; rm -rf "$tmp" && mkdir -p "$tmp/genomes" && printf '>tiny\nATGAAATAA\n' > "$tmp/genomes/tiny.fna" && if gtdbtk classify_wf --genome_dir "$tmp/genomes" --out_dir "$tmp/out" --cpus 1 >"$tmp/run.log" 2>&1; then cat "$tmp/run.log" >&2; exit 1; else grep -F 'The GTDB-Tk reference data does not exist or is corrupted.' "$tmp/run.log" >/dev/null && grep -F 'GTDBTK_DATA_PATH=/refdata/' "$tmp/run.log" >/dev/null && test ! -e "$tmp/out/gtdbtk.bac120.summary.tsv"; fi; status=$?; rm -rf "$tmp"; exit "$status"

upstream.name: GTDB-Tk
upstream.citation: Chaumeil et al. 2022; Chaumeil et al. 2019
